title: Review current backend error handling
description: Understand how errors flow through the backend today: exception hierarchy, what gets captured in Sentry vs swallowed, and whether it aligns with the error handling guidelines
close_reason: Review complete. Findings documented in docs/sentry-current-setup.md including exception hierarchy, asyncHandler explanation, and end-to-end flow.

title: Investigate whether Sentry middleware and errorHandler are redundant
description: Sentry.setupExpressErrorHandler(app) and our custom errorHandler both run on errors. Determine if both are needed, what each one does, and whether they can be simplified without losing Sentry context or error response quality.

title: Test backend Sentry configuration and verify data flow
description: Trigger test errors from the backend and confirm they appear correctly in Sentry: proper environment, release, user context, and stack traces

title: Remove Sentry.captureException from errorHandler middleware
description: Sentry.setupExpressErrorHandler already captures errors with trace context. Remove the manual Sentry.captureException call from errorHandler to eliminate double capture. Move filtering logic (skip validation/not-found) to beforeSend in instrument.ts instead.

title: Document current backend Sentry setup in markdown
description: Fill in docs/sentry-current-setup.md with backend-specific details: DSN, env vars, sample rates, what errors are sent, and the Sentry project URL
close_reason: docs/sentry-current-setup.md filled in with current backend Sentry setup

title: Define backend Sentry optimization goals
description: Based on the audit, identify what to improve in the backend: reduce noise, tighten sampling, improve error grouping, add missing context (user, request, etc)

title: Audit current backend Sentry setup
description: Review and document how Sentry is configured in the backend: DSN source, environment variables, sample rates, and what error types are being captured
close_reason: Audit complete. Findings documented in docs/sentry-current-setup.md
